scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @twitter-clone/api" "npm run dev -w @twitter-clone/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @twitter-clone/api && npm run test:unit -w @twitter-clone/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @twitter-clone/web && npm run lint -w @twitter-clone/api
